latin: Olaf amat amplexus calidos! homo niveus vivus erat et omnibus amplexus dare volebat. aestatem quoque amabat — nesciens se in sole liquefacturum esse.

questions.prompt: What does Olaf not realize about summer?
questions.target: That he would melt in the sun
choices: That he would melt in the sun

translation: Olaf loves warm hugs! The living snowman wanted to give hugs to everyone. He also loved summer — not knowing he would melt in the sun.
